BindHaVipInstance.clientToken: Idempotency token, ASCII string up to 64 characters, see [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
BindHaVipInstance.instanceIds: List of bound instance IDs, max 5 entries
BindHaVipInstance.instanceType: Type of bound instance: "SERVER" for cloud servers (BCC/BBC/DCC), "ENI" for elastic network interface
